column1: # Ordered top to bottom within each tier. MatchPattern is checked against installed Ollama model names.
# The first matching installed model wins; this file is a curated priority list, not a live benchmark.
# Leave MatchPattern empty for the tier fallback.

High|^qwen3\.5:9b$||Use as the simple-hardware default for WRITE SAFE, PLAN ONLY, and DEEP REVIEW profiles until heavier profile models are validated locally.|Keep `create_new_file` excluded for existing-file edits.
High||qwen3.5:9b|Pull and validate the simple-hardware profile model before approved edits.|Do not grant edit/apply roles until the editor Apply smoke test passes.
Medium|^qwen3\.5:9b$||Use as the simple-hardware default for WRITE SAFE, PLAN ONLY, and DEEP REVIEW profiles.|Prefer focused context and one scoped edit at a time.
Medium||qwen3.5:9b|Pull and validate the simple-hardware profile model before approved edits.|Prefer review and plan-only workflows until tool calls are proven.
Low|^qwen3\.5:9b$||Use as the smallest current supported profile candidate after latency and write validation are acceptable.|Use focused context and one scoped edit at a time.
Low||qwen3.5:9b|Pull and validate the simple-hardware profile model.|Avoid approved writes until validation passes.
